title: Myna
desc: A brave girl fights oppression and a pre birth promise of bonded labor to chase her dreams and find freedom. Courage inspires others to resist.

title: Nandini
desc: Rathnavel and Parvathy wed and flee from a clan. Their twins, Ganga and Nandini, diverge: one becomes human, the other serpent, guarding ancient powers.

title: Shambavi
desc: A young girl can transform into a Goddess during crisis to confront evil and protect victims.

title: Suryavamsha
desc: A rich man disliked his kind son for being uneducated. The family rediscovers important values. Despite obstacles, the son succeeds in the end, showing his true worth and proving everyone wrong.

title: Shanti Nivasaa
desc: A loving, loyal housewife Shanthi faces constant judgment from her husband and relatives. A twist of fate makes her confront her foe, Manthra, to save her marriage and family.

title: Myna
desc: A brave girl fights oppression and a pre birth promise of bonded labor to chase her dreams and find freedom. Courage inspires others to resist.

title: Krishna Vamshi
desc: The show follows Krishna and Vamshi, two young lovers from different backgrounds, as they face love, family pressure, and hope of building a future together

title: Anu Pallavi
desc: A man, separated from his girlfriend, finds himself drawn to a single mother coping with her husband's abandonment, complicating his feelings and relationships.

title: Sevanthi
desc: Sevanthi, an orphan, longs for a calm life, but fate pushes her toward tougher roles, forcing her to cope with heavy social pressure and expectations.

title: Myna
desc: A brave girl fights oppression and a pre birth promise of bonded labor to chase her dreams and find freedom. Courage inspires others to resist.

title: Bakthi Sudhe
desc: Host based program, wherein the host informs the viewers about various temples which are known for its rich heritage and culture.

title: Filler
desc: An engaging filler segment showcasing short entertainment bites, music and light-hearted moments to keep viewers refreshed.

title: Vitala Vitala panduranga
desc: Vithala secretly marries two women who don't know of each other. He tries hard to keep both happy, facing many challenges along the way.
